asset_name: Hand Card Strip — five-slot selection row
shared_properties: Uses the project core palette copy #D4AF37/#2B1B17/#00FFFF.
Five card slots fit the documented 80x120 px card size with 10 px horizontal gaps.
Panel anchors to the bottom-center overlay camera zone.
differences: This file carries the full hand strip with idle, hover, and disabled-cost states.
Card art thumbnails stay outside this task and can be layered inside the slot windows at runtime.

reference_images.label: duel_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Ground card-row density and slot spacing.

reference_images.label: source_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Ground 80x120 px card slots, five-card hand limit, and cost strip placement.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_5/ui_hand_card_strip_440x140.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under ui_hand_card_strip_440x140.
runtime_notes: Create a 3-column TextureAtlasLayout for idle, hover, and disabled-cost states.
Anchor the strip to the overlay camera at x=740 y=920.
Render card thumbnails as child entities clipped inside the 80x120 slot windows.

context.usage: Persistent overlay row for card selection, hover confirmation, and disabled-cost feedback.

shape.silhouette: Five-card horizontal strip with gold frames, navy panel fill, and a slim cost rail.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet canvas is exactly 1320x140 px with three 440x140 states.
Each card slot window is exactly 80x120 px and the horizontal gap is exactly 10 px.
Disabled-cost state darkens the slot fill while preserving the gold frame outline at 2 px thickness.
